title: 火车站
setting: Beijing West Railway Station, high-speed rail counter. 11:00. You need to buy a high-speed train ticket to Shanghai and negotiate with the ticket clerk.

npc.name: 售票员 张 (Shòupiàoyuán Zhāng)
npc.personality: efficient ticket clerk, professional but helpful. Speaks quickly in standard Mandarin.
npc.initialTranslation: Hello, buying a ticket? Where to?

debriefRu: 你在北京西站。你需要买一张去上海的火车票。跟售票员沟通清楚你的需求。
debriefEn: You are at Beijing West Station. You need to buy a train ticket to Shanghai. Communicate your needs clearly to the clerk.

turns.instruction: Greet the clerk and say you want a ticket to Shanghai for tomorrow.

prompt.ru: Nín hǎo, wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī zhāng míngtiān qù Shànghǎi de piào.
prompt.phonetic: Neen how, woh shyahng my ee jahng meeng-tyan chyoo Shahng-hai deh pyow.
prompt.en: Hello, I'd like to buy one ticket to Shanghai for tomorrow.
prompt.native_script: 您好，我想买一张明天去上海的票。

turns.instruction: Ask about departure times — are there morning trains?

prompt.ru: Qǐngwèn, yǒu zǎoshang chūfā de chēcì ma?
prompt.phonetic: Cheeng-wun, yoh dzaow-shahng choo-fah deh chur-tsur mah?
prompt.en: Excuse me, are there trains departing in the morning?
prompt.native_script: 请问，有早上出发的车次吗？

turns.instruction: Ask about seat classes — how much more is a first-class seat than a second-class seat?

prompt.ru: Yīděng zuò bǐ èr děng zuò guì duōshao?
prompt.phonetic: Ee-dung dzwor bee ur dung dzwor gway dwor-shaow?
prompt.en: How much more expensive is a first-class seat than a second-class seat?
prompt.native_script: 一等座比二等座贵多少？

turns.instruction: Say you'll take a second-class seat and ask which platform.

prompt.ru: Wǒ yào yī zhāng èr děng zuò. Zài nǎge zhàntái shàng chē?
prompt.phonetic: Woh yaow ee jahng ur dung dzwor. Dzai nah-gur jan-tai shahng chur?
prompt.en: I want a second-class seat. Which platform do I board from?
prompt.native_script: 我要一张二等座。在哪个站台上车？

turns.instruction: The clerk says it leaves at 8 a.m. Pay and confirm the departure time.

prompt.ru: Hǎo de, gěi nín. Xièxiè! Nín shuō de shì míngtiān zǎoshang bā diǎn kāichē, duì ba?
prompt.phonetic: How duh, gay neen. Syeh-syeh! Neen shwor duh shir meeng-tyan dzaow-shang bah dyan kigh-chur, dway bah?
prompt.en: Okay, here you go. Thanks! You said it leaves at 8 o'clock tomorrow morning, right?
prompt.native_script: 好的，给您。谢谢！您说的是明天早上八点开车，对吧？
